description: High-intent prospect: one career exchange, then shares resume when asked. Planner should close with resume_received (shorter than happy_path, still logical).

prospect.name: Marcus Webb
prospect.title: Engineering Manager, Infrastructure
prospect.about: Infra EM who still codes. Interested in early-stage founding-engineer and first-infra-hire roles.

recent_posts.text: Hiring tip: the best infra candidates ask about your deploy frequency before your stack.

prospect.outreach_topic: Series A infra and platform lead roles
prospect.notes: High intent; moves quickly once fit is clear but expects a proper ask before sharing resume.

replies.text: Thanks for connecting Nova! I'm actively exploring infra leadership roles at Series A companies — would love to hear what's in your network.
That sounds nice, would you like to view my resume? I am interested in working at a Series A company where I can own the platform while the product still moves fast.
